summary: A Go-based test runner and MCP orchestration tool heavily utilizing AI agents for extended test generation.
concerns: High volume of agent-generated extra tests (0005-0025) suggests potential flakiness or missing baseline coverage
Uncommitted modified and staged files in a post-release state (v0.21.1) could indicate rushed hotfixes
Deep nesting of generated test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/...) pollutes the repository structure
suggestions: Consolidate or clean up the numerous agent-generated test directories to reduce repository clutter
Ensure the staged and modified files are properly committed or reverted to maintain a clean release state
Review baseline test coverage to reduce the need for continuous extra test generation by AI agents
